$comment: S-P0-03/T01b (W-76) coverage RATCHET. floor = current measured lines% rounded DOWN to 1%. Raise floors each cluster — never lower without an ADR. Measured 2026-06-13, vitest v8 all:true (gateway/workers include src/**; web include components+lib). gateway floor 43 is measured WITH DB (RUN_DB_TESTS=1, 23/23 specs run = 43.8%) → checked in the CI `integration-db` job (`check-coverage.mjs gateway`). web/workers are DB-free → checked in the no-DB `test` job (`check-coverage.mjs web workers`). metric = lines.
